quick_skim.title: Mixtures of spatial factor analyzers for tensor-variate data
quick_skim.abstract: A mixture of spatial factor analyzers (MSFA) is introduced to address the challenges of clustering high-dimensional spatial data. By leveraging the underlying coordinate system, the proposed framework incorporates a flexible, spline-based spatial decay covariance structure that prevents parameter inflation as dimensionality increases. To model non-spatial dependence, matrix variate factor analyzers are employed for further dimensionality reduction. Parameter estimation is conducted via a variant of the expectation-maximization algorithm combined with a generalized least squares estimator. The proposed models are explored in the context of tensor-variate data analysis, where simulation studies and applications to Raman spectroscopy and hyperspectral texture databases demonstrate their capacity to accurately infer and differentiate distinct spatial patterns.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: mixture of spatial factor analyzers for tensor-variate data, applied to hyperspectral texture data
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 张量变量数据的空间因子分析混合模型，应用于高光谱纹理数据
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 张量变量数据的空间因子分析混合模型，应用于高光谱纹理数据
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 张量变量数据的空间因子分析混合模型，应用于高光谱纹理数据
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a mixture of spatial factor analyzers (MSFA) for clustering high-dimensional spatial data, using spline-based spatial decay covariance and matrix variate factor analyzers, demonstrated on hyperspectral texture data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对高维空间数据聚类问题，提出空间因子分析混合模型（MSFA）。该模型利用基于样条的空间衰减协方差结构避免参数膨胀，并通过矩阵变量因子分析器进一步降维。在拉曼光谱和高光谱纹理数据上的实验表明，MSFA能够有效处理张量变量数据，为高光谱数据分析提供了新工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对高维空间数据聚类问题，提出空间因子分析混合模型（MSFA）。该模型利用基于样条的空间衰减协方差结构避免参数膨胀，并通过矩阵变量因子分析器进一步降维。在拉曼光谱和高光谱纹理数据上的实验表明，MSFA能够有效处理张量变量数据，为高光谱数据分析提供了新工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: tensor based approaches for hyperspectral image anomaly detection and restoration
